debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
elt : α
idx : ℕ
hidx : idx ≤ l1.length
⊢ idx = 0

failed_attempts:
simp
          simp [h₁] at hidx
          have h₂ : idx ≤ 0 := by simpa using hidx
          omega
        simp [this]
        <;> simp_all [List.insertIdx]
        <;> simp_all [Nat.succ_le_iff]
        <;> cases l2 <;> simp_all [List.insertAt]
        <;> simp_all [List.insertAt]
        <;> omega
      | cons hd tl ih =>
        cases idx with
        | zero =>
          simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.cons_append]
          <;> simp_all [List.insertAt]
          <;> simp_all [List.insertAt]
          <;> cases l2 <;> simp_all [List.insertAt]
          <;> simp_all [List.insertAt]
          <;> omega
        | succ i =>
          simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.cons_append]
          <;> simp_all [List.insertAt]
          <;> cases l2 <;> simp_all [List.insertAt]
          <;> simp_all [List.insertAt]
          <;> omega

simpa [List.length] using hidx
          exact Nat.le_antisymm (by omega) (by omega)
        simp_all [List.insertIdx_cons, List.length, List.append_assoc]
        <;> cases h <;> simp_all [List.insertIdx]
        <;> try omega
        <;> try simp_all [List.insertIdx]
        <;> try omega
        <;> try simp_all [List.insertIdx]
        <;> try omega
      | cons x xs ih =>
        simp_all [List.length, List.insertIdx]
        <;> cases hidx with
        | inl h =>
          simp_all [List.insertIdx]
          <;> try omega
          <;> try simp_all [List.insertIdx]
          <;> try omega
        | inr h =>
          have h' : xs.length = xs.length := rfl
          have h'' : idx ≤ xs.length := by omega
          have h''' := ih idx h''
          simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.append_cons, List.append_assoc]
          <;> try omega
          <;> try simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.append_assoc]
          <;> try omega

simp at hidx
      <;> omega
    simp [this]
    <;>
    simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.length, Nat.lt_succ_iff]
    <;>
    try omega
    <;>
    try linarith
  | cons hd tl ih =>
    cases idx with
    | zero =>
      simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.length, Nat.lt_succ_iff]
      <;>
      try omega
      <;>
      try linarith
    | succ i =>
      simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.length, Nat.lt_succ_iff]
      <;>
      try omega
      <;>
      try linarith
      <;>
      try
        {
          have h := ih (i) (by
            simp_all [List.length]
            <;> omega
          )
          simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.length, Nat.lt_succ_iff]
          <;> try omega
          <;> try linarith
        }
      <;>
      try
        {
          simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.length, Nat.lt_succ_iff]
          <;> try omega
          <;> try linarith
        }

simp at hidx
      <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try nlinarith)
      <;>
      omega

simpa using hidx
    <;> simp_all
  | cons hd tl ih =>
    simp_all [List.length_cons, List.insertIdx]
    <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try {
      cases idx with
      | zero => simp_all
      | succ idx =>
        apply ih
        <;> omega
    }) <;>
    (try {
      omega
    })

l1 l2 idx hidx
    exact h₂
  exact h_main

simp_all
          omega
        simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.cons, List.nil]
        <;> aesop
      | cons hd tl IH =>
        cases idx with
        | zero =>
          simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.cons, List.nil]
          <;> aesop
        | succ idx' =>
          simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.cons, List.nil, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
          <;>
            (try simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.cons, List.nil, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]) <;>
            (try aesop) <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.cons, List.nil, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, List.append_assoc]) <;>
            (try aesop)
          <;>
          (try omega) <;>
          (try simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.cons, List.nil, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, List.append_assoc]) <;>
          (try aesop)

simpa using hidx
          have h₂ : idx ≥ 0 := by omega
          omega
        simp_all [List.insertIdx]
        <;> aesop
      | cons hd tl IH =>
        cases idx with
        | zero =>
          simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.cons_append]
          <;> aesop
        | succ i =>
          simp_all [List.insertIdx, List.cons_append]
          <;> aesop

simpa using hidx
          have h' : 0 ≤ idx := by omega
          omega
        -- Since we have a contradiction in the assumptions, we can directly conclude the proof.
        subst_vars
        <;> simp_all [List.insertIdx]

simp_all [List.length]
          have h₁ : 0 ≤ idx := by
            exact Nat.zero_le idx
          linarith

simp at hidx <;> omega
        simp [this]
      | cons hd tl hr =>
        cases idx with
        | zero =>
          simp_all [List.insertIdx]
          <;> simp_all [List.cons_append]
          <;> congr 1 <;> simp_all [List.cons_append]
        | succ i =>
          simp_all [List.insertIdx]
          <;> simp_all [List.cons_append]
          <;> congr 1 <;> simp_all [List.cons_append]
          <;> try omega

simp [h] at h₂
      <;> omega
    simp [h₁]
  | cons a l1 ih =>
    simp_all [List.length]
    <;> omega
